fixSummary.title: PDP Conversion Bug Fix - Size Selection & Add-to-Cart

rootCauses.title: Hardcoded First Variant
rootCauses.description: AddToCartButton always received first size variant regardless of user selection
rootCauses.impact: User selects size 42 but size 38 (first) is added to cart

rootCauses.title: No Size Button State Management
rootCauses.description: Size buttons had no onClick handlers and no visual feedback
rootCauses.evidence: proizvod/[slug]/page.tsx lines 94-101: buttons have disabled attribute but no onClick
rootCauses.impact: User doesn't know if their size selection worked
rootCauses.revenueImpact: High - Confusion leads to cart abandonment

rootCauses.title: alert() Instead of Professional UX
rootCauses.description: Using browser alert() for feedback instead of inline messaging
rootCauses.revenueImpact: Medium - Poor UX leads to lower trust

rootCauses.title: No Validation for Empty Size Selection
rootCauses.description: User can add to cart without selecting a size (would add first variant)
rootCauses.evidence: AddToCartButton has no size validation logic

filesModified.purpose: Client-side state management for size selection
keyFeatures: Handler: handleSizeSelect() - updates state on size button click
Responsive grid: 3 cols mobile → 5 cols desktop
Visual states: selected (BLACK bg), disabled (gray), default (border)
Error message: Red text below size buttons if no selection
Props to AddToCartButton: variantId (computed), onSizeRequired callback

filesModified.purpose: Add success/error feedback UI, replace alert()

changes.description: New successMessage state for inline feedback
Green box for success (rounds, light bg, auto-hide 3s)
Red box for errors (rounds, light bg, auto-hide 5s)
Check if variantId <= 0 and call onSizeRequired instead of adding

keyFeatures: Styled feedback boxes with Tailwind (no external deps)
Improved error messages in Serbian language

filesModified.purpose: Replace inline size grid with ProductDetailsClient component
keyFeatures: Cleaner code (removes duplicate size rendering logic)

before.description: Size buttons non-functional, first variant always sent to cart
flow: User views PDP with size buttons (no onClick handlers)
User thinks they click a size but nothing visible happens
WRONG size added to cart, user discovers later

after.description: Size selection managed by state, correct variant sent to cart
flow: Button turns BLACK with white text (visual feedback)
Green success box appears for 3 seconds

state.updates: handleSizeSelect(sku) when user clicks size button

state.description: Show error message if user tries to add without selecting size
state.updates: Set to true in onSizeRequired, false when size selected
state.display: Red error text below size buttons

state.description: True while API call is in progress

testingScenarios.name: Normal Size Selection & Add
steps: 1. Navigate to any PDP with multiple sizes
2. Observe size buttons (should look like clickable buttons)
EXPECT: Button turns BLACK with white text (selected state)
EXPECT: Green box 'Dodano u korpu! ✓' appears
EXPECT: Product is in cart with size 42 (verify in cart details)

testingScenarios.name: No Size Selected - Validation
steps: 1. Navigate to PDP with multiple sizes
2. Do NOT click any size button
EXPECT: Red error message appears: 'Molimo izaberite veličinu prije nego što dodate u korpu.'
EXPECT: Nothing is added to cart

testingScenarios.name: Size Out of Stock - Disabled State
steps: 1. Navigate to PDP where at least one size is out of stock
EXPECT: Out-of-stock sizes appear grayed out (different styling)
3. Try to click an out-of-stock size
EXPECT: Click doesn't register (HTML disabled attribute)

testingScenarios.name: Multiple Size Changes
steps: EXPECT: Size 38 button returns to normal state

testingScenarios.name: Add Multiple Items with Different Sizes
steps: EXPECT: Same product appears TWICE - once with size 40, once with size 42

testingScenarios.name: Mobile Responsiveness
steps: 3. Navigate to PDP on mobile viewport (375px width)
EXPECT: Size buttons are in 3 columns (not cramped)
EXPECT: Size button turns black (visible on mobile)
EXPECT: Green success box appears and is readable (not cut off)
EXPECT: Size buttons now in 4 columns

testingScenarios.name: API Error Handling
steps: 2. Go offline or throttle network to fail requests
EXPECT: Red error box appears with message 'Nije moguće dodati u korpu. Molimo pokušajte ponovo.'
EXPECT: Button is re-enabled (not stuck in loading)

testingScenarios.name: Success Message Auto-Dismiss
steps: 1. Select size and click 'Dodaj u korpu'
EXPECT: Box auto-hides after exactly 3 seconds (no interaction needed)
EXPECT: User can continue browsing without the box cluttering view

testingScenarios.name: No alert() Popup
steps: 1. Complete full add-to-cart flow multiple times
EXPECT: No browser alert() popup appears
EXPECT: Inline green box appears instead
EXPECT: No disruption to user experience

preDeploy: ✅ AddToCartButton.tsx modified without breaking other features
✅ Tailwind CSS classes are valid (no typos)
✅ All state names are unique (no conflicts)
✅ Backward compatibility checked (other components using AddToCartButton still work)
testing: ✅ T1 passed: Normal size selection and add works
✅ T2 passed: Validation error shows when no size selected
✅ T3 passed: Out-of-stock sizes are disabled
✅ T4 passed: Changing size selection works multiple times
✅ T5 passed: Can add multiple items with different sizes
✅ T6 passed: Mobile responsive (3-5 column grid)
✅ T7 passed: Error handling works (red box with recovery)
postDeploy: 📊 Monitor cart additions (should increase if tracking was broken)
📊 Check error logs for failed API calls
💬 Gather user feedback in first week
🔍 Verify size variants are correctly added to carts

renderPerformance.cssSize: Zero additional CSS (Tailwind already in bundle)

userExperience.pageLoadSpeed: Same as before (no additional data fetches)

if_issues_arise: REVERT add-to-cart.tsx to previous version (restore alert().)
REVERT proizvod/[slug]/page.tsx to inline size grid + hardcoded first variant
monitoring: Set up alerts for cart API errors
Monitor page load time (should stay same)
